productDisplayName: Puma Men Jago Ripstop White Sports Shoes
description: The leather and synthetic upper ensures durability, as does the rubber sole in these Jago Ripstop shoes from puma. These fun looking sneakers are very lightweight as part of the upper and the tongue are made of nylon, which makes for a great feel on your feet.UpperNylon and synthetic upper for maximum durabilityLace up system ensures customised FitLightly padded tongue and collar for extremely snug fitBrand tab stitched to the heel cupPerforations on the back foot for ventilationOutsole reinforced onto the upper at the toe to act as a toe guardTextile lining with cushioned sole for all day comfortMidsoleLightweight phylon midsole for great feelOutsoleDurable TPU outsole with honeycomb pattern lugs on the forefootCurved midfoot with a air unit at the upraised, decoupled heelHerringbone patterned lugs on the heelshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine washKeep leather shiny with a branded leather conditionerStore shoes away from sunlight
